tagline: Table header color customization: Authors can now set font color, background color, and text formatting for table column headers.
what_it_does: Table header color customization: Authors can now set font color, background color, and text formatting for table column headers. Dashboard relationships (Private Preview): Dashboard relationships, which allow users to create complex multi fact data models, are now in Private Preview. Local metric view parameters: Local metric views now support parameters, allowing Databricks to dynamically change query inputs based on user selections in a UI.
why_it_matters: Image upload suggestions for Power BI and Tableau imports (Beta): Genie Code now suggests that authors upload images when importing files from Power BI and Tableau to improve migration quality.
key_takeaway: Table header color customization: Authors can now set font color, background color, and text formatting for table column headers.
